synopsis: Insider presents our dazzling new look issue! With all-new features, amazing interviews, and a few new surprises, this unmissable issue features: New Star Wars heroes Finn and Rey profiled! Star Wars: The Force Awakens Doug Chiang on creating designs for the Star Wars galaxy! Set Decorator Roger Christian reveals secrets of the saga as he offers a tour of the Millennium Falcon! And don't miss our amazing all-new fiction!
title: Insider #167
